terminology.context_meaning: 如 7nm, 5nm, 3nm，需要注意翻译时不要语义重复，如 N3 node直接翻译成3纳米制程
基于人类反馈的强化学习
一种深度学习模型架构
只有表示大模型等的评测方式时翻译成基准测试
每秒万亿次运算 (Trillions Operations Per Second)
垂直整合制造商 (Integrated Device Manufacturer)
大模型的预填充阶段，常和decode一起出现
大模型的解码阶段，常和prefill一起出现
连续出现可以适当缩写成德州

00-intro.role_in_article: Sets the commercial and technical stakes of the Vera Rubin NVL72 system and pitches the proprietary BoM and Power Budget Model.
00-intro.relation_to_previous: None. Serves as the article's opening.
00-intro.relation_to_next: Transitions from high-level market impact ($500B buildout) to the specific foundational silicon components that drive the system.
key_points: The VR NVL72 introduces major new hardware components including Spectrum-6, ConnectX-9, and BlueField-4.
Vendor market share in this $500B buildout will create massive market dislocations, making component-level BoM analysis critical.
translation_notes: Maintain the assertive, commercial urgency of the sales pitch in the final paragraph.
Ensure trademarked names (Vera, Rubin, NVLink, ConnectX-9, Spectrum-6) are kept in English or use established bilingual conventions.

01-extreme-co-design-6-silicon-p.role_in_article: Details the core silicon and networking innovations that form the foundation of the Rubin platform's massive scale-out capabilities.
01-extreme-co-design-6-silicon-p.relation_to_previous: Delivers on the intro's promise by providing the first deep-dive technical specs on the silicon components.
01-extreme-co-design-6-silicon-p.relation_to_next: Moves from individual chip and switch specifications to how these chips are integrated at the macro rack level (Oberon NVL72).
key_points: Spectrum-6 CPO enables larger scale-out clusters via doubled radix.
Achieves 102.4T switching bandwidth using 512x 200G SerDes and 32 on-package 3.2T optical engines.
translation_notes: Highly technical networking terms require precise industry-standard Chinese equivalents: 'radix' (端口基数/基数), 'SerDes' (串行解串器), 'CPO' (光电共封装).
Ensure 'optical engines' is translated as 光引擎.

02-rubin-oberon-rack-nvl72-not-n.role_in_article: Explains the macro architectural shift to the NVL72 rack scale form factor and the underlying memory economics driving this change.
02-rubin-oberon-rack-nvl72-not-n.relation_to_previous: Zooms out from the silicon level to the rack-scale integration (Oberon vs HGX).
02-rubin-oberon-rack-nvl72-not-n.relation_to_next: Narrows the focus from the whole rack down to the newly redesigned compute tray within that rack.
key_points: The AI server paradigm has shifted from chassis-level to rack-scale (Oberon/NVL72) as the primary form factor.
Rising DDR pricing compresses the premium of HBM, eliminating the cost benefits of GDDR and driving the shift in memory architecture.
translation_notes: Translate 'memory economics' as 存储经济学 or 内存经济学.
Carefully translate 'premium compresses' (溢价收窄/溢价压缩) to accurately reflect the financial argument regarding DDR vs HBM pricing.

03-compute-tray-redesign.role_in_article: Introduces the most significant mechanical and architectural change in the system: the cableless, modular compute tray.
03-compute-tray-redesign.relation_to_previous: Zooms in from the macro rack level to the specific, critical subsystem (the compute tray).
03-compute-tray-redesign.relation_to_next: Sets up the deep dive into the electrical and material engineering required to make the cableless design function.
key_points: Eliminating internal cables reduces compute tray assembly time from 2 hours to 5 minutes.
Adopts a modular design using board-to-board connectors and a new midplane module.
KV cache capacity demands are driving memory architecture beyond what single tiers of memory can support.
translation_notes: Translate 'compute tray' consistently as 计算托盘.
Ensure 'KV cache' remains KV Cache or KV缓存.
Preserve the stark contrast in Jensen's assembly time claim (2 hours to 5 minutes) without softening the metric.

04-compute-tray-cableless-design.role_in_article: Explains the electrical, signal integrity, and material engineering challenges overcome to enable the cableless tray.
04-compute-tray-cableless-design.relation_to_previous: Elaborates on the 'how' and 'why' of the cableless design introduced in the previous section.
04-compute-tray-cableless-design.relation_to_next: Shifts from electrical and signal integrity challenges to the thermal challenges of this highly dense tray.
key_points: The cableless design relies heavily on advanced PCBs and copper foil upgrades.
Geometry loss (from vias and layer swaps) and insertion loss are major hurdles in real-world PCB channels.
The shift drives significant value increases in high-end CCL and PCB content.
translation_notes: Translate 'insertion loss' as 插入损耗 and 'geometry loss' as 几何损耗.
The metaphor 'bumps in a highway' should be translated fluidly (e.g., 就像高速公路上的减速带) to maintain the explanatory tone.
Ensure 'CCL' is translated as 覆铜板 (Copper Clad Laminate).

05-compute-tray-thermal.role_in_article: Details the 100% liquid cooling architecture required by the dense, fanless compute tray and the resulting changes to assembly processes.
05-compute-tray-thermal.relation_to_previous: Addresses the thermal consequences of the dense, cableless PCB design discussed previously.
05-compute-tray-thermal.relation_to_next: Transitions from thermal management to power delivery, the other critical infrastructure pillar of the tray.
key_points: The tray is 100% liquid-cooled and fanless, utilizing an internal manifold.
The micro-channel cold plate (MCCP) pitch is reduced to 100 microns to increase surface area and cooling capacity.
Cold plates are now attached at the L6 assembly level rather than L10, increasing overall assembly efficiency.
translation_notes: Clearly distinguish 'L6 assembly' (L6级组装) and 'L10 assembly' (L10级组装).
Translate 'micro-channel cold plate (MCCP)' as 微通道冷板.
Translate 'quick disconnects' as 快速接头 or 盲插快速接头 depending on exact context.

06-compute-tray-power-delivery.role_in_article: Explains the power routing, voltage step-downs, and efficiency improvements within the compute tray.
06-compute-tray-power-delivery.relation_to_previous: Parallels the thermal section by explaining the power infrastructure of the exact same tray.
06-compute-tray-power-delivery.relation_to_next: Completes the electrical and thermal picture before moving to the physical mechanical structures holding the tray together.
key_points: 50VDC power is delivered via internal busbars to Strata boards and the power distribution module (PDB).
Using 50V at 96A reduces power loss by 17x compared to 12V at 400A due to the quadratic relationship between power loss and current.
The PDB steps power down to 12VDC for specific front-chassis modules like CX-9 and BlueField-4.
translation_notes: Ensure the physics concept 'quadratic relationship' is translated accurately as 二次方关系 or 平方关系.
Translate 'busbar clips' as 母排夹 or 汇流排夹.
Translate 'power distribution module (PDB)' as 配电模块.

07-compute-tray-mechanical.role_in_article: Describes the physical chassis, guiding mechanisms, and locking structures that physically enable the modular, cableless design.
07-compute-tray-mechanical.relation_to_previous: Grounds the thermal and power delivery systems in the physical, mechanical constraints of the tray.
07-compute-tray-mechanical.relation_to_next: Zooms back out from the compute tray's internal mechanicals to the macro rack-level facility infrastructure.
key_points: Mechanical structures divide the front chassis to house Orchid, BlueField, and PDB modules.
Loading mechanisms apply necessary force to lock modules into Paladin connectors and MQDs, ensuring secure connections.
translation_notes: Translate 'MQD' (Manifold Quick Disconnect) as 分水器快速接头 or 盲插快速接头.
Translate 'loading mechanism' as 加载机构, 压紧机构, or 锁紧机构.
Keep mechanical descriptions highly visual and precise to aid technical comprehension.

08-rack-level-infrastructure-the.role_in_article: Analyzes the macro-level cooling implications of the new architecture and its disruptive impact on the broader data center cooling ecosystem.
08-rack-level-infrastructure-the.relation_to_previous: Zooms out from the tray-level mechanicals and cooling to the facility and rack-level cooling ecosystem.
08-rack-level-infrastructure-the.relation_to_next: Concludes the current technical deep dive, leaving the reader with a major market takeaway regarding infrastructure suppliers.
key_points: Vera Rubin can operate with 45C inlet temperatures, potentially eliminating the need for mechanical compressor-based chillers.
This capability is a massive surprise to the market and represents a major disruption to the existing cooling supplier ecosystem.
translation_notes: Translate 'Mr. Market' as 市场先生 (a standard finance personification).
Translate 'mechanical compressor-based chillers' as 基于机械压缩机的冷水机组.
Preserve the contrarian, analytical tone regarding market expectations and ecosystem disruption.
